scripts.predev: powershell -Command "@(5000,5173) | ForEach-Object { $p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -EA SilentlyContinue) | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -gt 0 } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($p) { taskkill /PID $p /F | Out-Null; Write-Host \"Killed port $_\" } }"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BE,FE" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
